name: Shouta Magatsuchi
description:
**Relatives**: Mr. Magatsuchi (father), Saori Magatsuchi (mother)

Shouta Magatsuchi is a young boy born into a family of mages in the modern world. He has shown to possess enough knowledge on the arcane arts to attempt summoning a demon. [Lucoa](https://anilist.co/character/120975/Quetzalcoatl) came out of a summoning portal Shouta created and starts living with him.

Shouta is an elementary school boy in 5th grade with both purple hair and eyes. His bangs reach well below his eyebrows. His appearance looks partly androgynous.

Shouta is quiet and shy most of the time when seen with Lucoa. When Lucoa attempts to seduce Shouta, he would run away with embarrassment and accuse Lucoa of being a demon.

As [his father](https://anilist.co/character/248474) is [Kobayashi](https://anilist.co/character/120969/Kobayashi)'s manager, she's asked to look after Shouta at times.
